definition.featurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="feature_container" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><value name="feature"><block type="feature_disk_simple"><field name="half_height">1</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This block represents a disk of clay</comment><value name="block"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="block">Blocks.GRASS</field></block></value><value name="target"><block type="block_predicate_matching_blocks"><field name="x">0</field><field name="y">0</field><field name="z">0</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">The disk can only replace dirt and clay</comment><value name="blockSet"><block type="block_holderset_tag"><field name="tag">minecraft:sand</field></block></value></block></value><value name="radius"><block type="int_provider_uniform"><field name="min">4</field><field name="max">8</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">The disk has a radius between 2 and 3</comment></block></value></block></value><next><block type="placement_in_square"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This moves the feature so that it doesn't generate in the corner only</comment><next><block type="placement_heightmap"><field name="heightmap">WORLD_SURFACE_WG</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">We try to generate the feature on the ocean floor</comment></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
